title: Argus Partners advises Moving Tech on acquisition of Netherlands' Automicle Holding
description: Moving Tech Innovations Private Limited has acquired Automicle Holding BV, a company incorporated and headquartered in the Netherlands.Argus Partners advised Moving Tech on this acquisition.The transaction team consisted of Anantha Krishnan Iyer (Partner) and Shubham Tiwary (Associate).The Firm had recently advised Moving Tech on a fundraise.Moving Tech Innovations is a Bengaluru-based mobility technology company behind some of India's most widely used ride-hailing and public transport platforms
